title: MiraOptimizerвңЁVULKAN
description: вңЁA simple optimization build divided into two SODIUMрҹӨқVULKANвңЁ
body:
![icon11](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3373e31eac367c345b5e5efdb6e105d74d36817.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd69f80f22d3cdf512668d89ebc1851c73779e0a.png)
It is important to note that the assembly was divided into two parts: one for sodium and the other for vulkanmodвҖјпёҸвҖјпёҸ[the assembly of sodium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mireoptimiz)

What is the differenceвқ“

Sodium-highly compatible with other mods, shader support

Vulkanmod-higher performance

**about the assembly**

a lightweight mod pack that optimizes Minecraft well,
_customize the game for yourself_
![test](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffa19a35e9e01f9f186b1eeab96069355d20d490.png)
_the gameplay itself becomes smoother, but everyone's results are different_
